# recent

## Plugin reference

- Description: Recency-sorted flat task list tab.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Tasks.View` "Recent" → `TasksRecentView`
  - Uses: `primitives/data-view.DataView`, `primitives/data-view.defineDataView`, `primitives/data-view.FieldDef`, `primitives/live-state.matchResource`, `primitives/live-state.useResource`, `primitives/relative-time.RelativeTime`, `tasks/task-list.Tasks`, `tasks/task-status.STATUS_META`, `tasks/task-status.StatusBadge`
